title: Phase 17 Enterprise policy model (PR81-PR85) — PolicyBundle, evaluation adapter, management API, fixtures, audit identity
notes: PR75.8: Athanor POST evidence-provenance (204) and candidates (202) covered with WebApplicationFactory + TestAgentRunRepository seeding AgentRun.Start (Running); PR23-API-003 / PR24-API-003 flipped true.

PR75.7: repository tightening — broadened verify-repo-clean.ps1 (harness, .cursor, scripts, workflows, docs, src, tests, benchmarks, optional fixtures, root policy files); CI runs verify-harness (ExpectedPhase 15, PR75.7) + verify-repo-clean; AGENTS.md current boundaries; Program.cs endpoint extension methods; feature-list note fix (ProfileId vs Phase 11 identity); v1.0-RC-DEFERRED-ITEMS + v1.0-RC-REPO-STATUS; UTF-8 no BOM on touched files; no Phase 16 product work.
PR75.6: repository hygiene - removed root scratch Python; verify-repo-clean.ps1 + run-benchmarks.ps1; compact current-pr; v1.0-RC-DEFERRED-ITEMS.md; contract/redaction tests; no Phase 16 work.

Phase 15 PR71-PR75: v1.0 platform hardening — SensitiveFieldCatalog/RedactionPolicy/JsonRedaction for audit export + evaluation JSON; BenchmarkDotNet project benchmarks/Agentor.Benchmarks; CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml: dotnet ef migrations list, evaluation test slice, Docker image build, TRX artifacts); Agentor.Contracts.Tests DTO round-trips; docs phase15-redaction.md, phase15-performance-baselines.md, CONTRACT_VERSIONING.md, MIGRATION_AND_UPGRADE.md, docs/RELEASE/v1.0-RC.md, ARCHITECTURE_BOUNDARY_REVIEW.md.

Phase 14 PR66-PR70: versioned evaluation fixture registry (schema 4, kind EvaluationFixtureRegistry), harness fixture parse (schema >=2), coordination profiles (SequentialPipeline, SkillWrappedSequential, McpToolBoundPlan, ExternalAgentTool, ReviewGatedPlan) via HarnessProfileMaterializer, quality rule sets (QualityRuleSetEvaluator, JSON predicates only), CoordinationEvaluationMetrics from run/manifest artifacts, deterministic EvaluationReportGenerator (Markdown/JSON/CSV + CI folder). Tests: tests/Agentor.Application.Tests/Evaluation/*.cs; fixtures: tests/Agentor.Application.Tests/fixtures/eval/registry.json, quality-rules-*.json.

Phase 12 PR56-PR60: run queue (inline + in-memory background), durable outbox + dispatcher, execution leases + distributed op ledger, HTTP transport resilience registry, EF persistence + migration 20260512080000_Phase12Reliability.
PR60.5: harness reconciliation; OutboxDispatcherTests; Phase12EfRoundTripTests (Sqlite); TransportResilienceRegistryTests.
ProfileId fallback is legacy compatibility only; explicit ProjectId/KnowledgeScopeId exists after Phase 11 (see docs/ATHANOR_INTEGRATION_BOUNDARY.md).
Phase 6 PR26-PR30: Conexus model-gateway port (fake), governed model-call tool, prompt/model profile refs, declared budget gates on model tool input, manifest v1.1 aggregates Conexus telemetry.

PR30.5: Conexus/budget hardening - model-call telemetry aggregation moved to Application (ModelCallTelemetryAggregator); Domain RunManifest takes RunManifestModelTelemetry; declared budget is pre-execution optional-input gating (docs + tests).

Phase 7 PR31-PR35: SkillPackage model; RecipeStepKind.Skill + ISkillPackageCatalog + plan executor skill traces; bounded session memory on AgentRun + EF session_memory_json; RunEvaluationHarness; RunQualityGateEvaluator.

PR35.5 (Phase 7 hardening): granular harness acceptance rows for PR31-PR35; evaluation JSON fixture for RunEvaluationSnapshot; stronger quality gate codes + plan warning; skill audit trace assertions; session memory boundary doc; PlanInputBuilder extracted from SequentialAgentPlanExecutor.
Phase 8 PR36: IMcpRegistryClient port; FakeMcpRegistryClient (in-memory catalog + deterministic invoke); DI registration; docs/MCP_BOUNDARY.md; Infrastructure tests.
Phase 8 PR37: McpToolKeys + McpToolExecutor; ToolRegistry.CreateDefault registers discovered MCP tools; ToolRegistryMcpBindingTests.
Phase 8 PR38: ActivitySource + request counter; JSON console logging in Development; docs/OBSERVABILITY.md; ObservabilityTests.
Phase 8 PR39: Dockerfile (publish Agentor.Api), docker-compose.yml, .github/workflows/ci.yml, scripts/smoke.ps1, .dockerignore.
Phase 8 PR40: appsettings + AgentorRuntimeOptions default version 0.1.0-rc.1; docs/ROADMAP.md v0.1 RC note.

Phase 9 PR41-PR45: IExternalAgentProtocolClient + deterministic fakes (generic + A2A-styled); external-agent.discover / external-agent.invoke via ToolRegistry + policy + pipeline; RunManifest v1.2 external-agent telemetry; trace kinds + SequentialAgentPlanExecutor deny/review paths; RunEvaluationHarness snapshot external counts + RunQualityGateEvaluator EXTERNAL_AGENT_OUTPUT_UNREVIEWED; fixtures eval/external-agent-one-call.json; no real network transports.

Phase 10 PR46-PR50: Agentor:Integrations modes Fake|Http|Disabled; HTTP adapters (Athanor knowledge state, Conexus model gateway, MCP registry, ExternalAgents protocol); named HttpClients; /health liveness-only; /ready and GET /api/v1/integrations/status via IntegrationSurfaceService.
PR50.5: HTTP readiness probes fail on non-2xx; Disabled adapters report detail=disabled while Ready=true; API + Infrastructure tests; harness bumped to phase 10.

PR55.5: Phase 11 harness reconciliation: granular acceptance rows, expanded tests (scope, Athanor project id, policy profile, human review, actor accessor, audit export, persistence), docs/GOVERNANCE_BOUNDARY.md, verification log updated.
Phase 11 code (PR51-PR55) is implemented in-tree; PR55.5 records harness acceptance only for behaviors covered by automated tests or explicit harness notes.

Phase 13 PR61-PR65: /api/v1 product surface (management CRUD: recipes, plans, skills, policy-profiles; run aliases: timeline, coordination-view, audit-packet; operator dashboard; review inbox aliases). Phase13ProductSurfaceApiTests; domain/application human-review tests.
PR65.5: docs under docs/api|operator|developer|examples; harness phase 13; verify-harness PR65.5.

Phase 17 PR81-PR85 (2026-05-10): Enterprise policy model — PolicyBundle (versioned, immutable after publish, duplicate rule IDs rejected); PolicyRule (ToolAccess/ModelBudget/McpToolAccess/ExternalAgentAccess + Allow/Deny/RequiresReview effects + factory helpers); PolicyProfile + ActivePolicyProfile domain types; IPolicyBundleRepository + IPolicyProfileRepository abstractions; PolicyBundleRulesAdapter (bundle→PolicyProfileRules); InMemoryPolicyBundleRepository + InMemoryPolicyProfileRepository; RuntimePolicyEvaluator 2-constructor pattern (3-param test, 5-param DI) with bundle-aware 7-step evaluation; PolicyProfileRules.RequiresReviewToolKeys added; RequiresReview distinct from Deny; PolicyBundleDtos + 4 API endpoints; DtoMappings + DI wiring; 38 new tests (25 domain + 13 evaluation); 3 fixture JSONs; audit export policyIdentity; docs/developer/policy-bundles.md. Grand total: 298 tests passing.

acceptanceItems.description: IKnowledgeStateClient port defines read + candidate + review operations without Canonize
FakeKnowledgeStateClient implements port with in-memory behavior
DI registers IKnowledgeStateClient to FakeKnowledgeStateClient
LookupCanonicalEntryAsync resolves from seeded snapshot
Latest snapshot query returns seeded data when run exists
Canonical lookup returns RunExists=false for unknown run
Canonical lookup rejects empty canonical key
GET latest snapshot returns 404 for unknown run
GET canonical returns 404 for unknown run
GET canonical returns 400 when key is empty
Evidence search provenance attaches trace when run is Running
POST evidence-provenance returns 409 when run is not Running
Public API returns 2xx for evidence-provenance while run is Running
Candidate submission records trace when run is Running
Submit candidate returns false without trace when run is not Running
POST candidates returns 409 when run is not Running
Public API returns 2xx for candidate submit while run is Running
IKnowledgeStateClient has no Canonize-named operations
AgentRun declared public surface has no Canonize-named methods
Fake submit status documents non-canon outcome
Review queue records AthanorReviewQueued when run is Running
Queue review returns false without trace when run is not Running
POST review-queue returns 409 when run is not Running

acceptanceItems.description: RunManifest domain stays integration-agnostic; model-call output parsing lives in Application ModelCallTelemetryAggregator
Declared budget caps documented as optional pre-execution tool-input checks (not post-run spend enforcement)
Runtime policy allows model tool when declaredCostUnits/declaredLatencyMs omitted even if caps are configured
Successful conexus.model-complete output rolls into manifest v1.1 token/cost/latency aggregates (non-zero path)
SkillPackage validates required skill key, name, purpose, and procedure steps
SkillPackage rejects duplicate procedure step ids/order indexes and enforces ToolRef keys
SkillPackage.DeclaredToolKeys lists ToolRef tool keys for policy/catalog alignment
Recipe supports RecipeStepKind.Skill with InvokedSkillKey and InvokedSkillVersion
SequentialAgentPlanExecutor resolves skills from ISkillPackageCatalog and records SkillInvocation* traces with skill key and version
Skill procedure segments record procedureStepId; inner tool traces include procedureStepId and toolKey
Inner skill ToolRef executes through policy + tool pipeline with ToolCall and PolicyDecision evidence on the AgentStep
AgentRun.TryWriteSessionMemory enforces SessionMemoryBudget with accept/reject traces
Plan tool input includes session:{key} entries from run scratch memory
Session scratch persisted via EF session_memory_json column and RecordMapper
RunEvaluationHarness.ExecutePlanAsync returns RunEvaluationSnapshot with status, trace count, tool calls, plan steps
Evaluation harness regression fixture matches deterministic RunEvaluationSnapshot
RunQualityGateEvaluator: completed run with RunCompleted trace passes
RunQualityGateEvaluator: failed run yields RUN_FAILED when completion is required
RunQualityGateEvaluator: requires-review run yields RUN_REQUIRES_REVIEW when completion is required
RunQualityGateEvaluator: completed run without RunCompleted trace yields MISSING_RUN_COMPLETED_TRACE
RunQualityGateEvaluator: optional plan warns with COMPLETED_RUN_WITH_FAILED_PLAN_STEP
PR35.5: harness acceptance expanded; evaluator and evaluation harness hardening
PR35.5: PlanInputBuilder isolates plan-step tool input construction
PR35.5: Session memory boundary documented as run-scratch, non-canon, not Athanor
IMcpRegistryClient lists servers/tools and invokes tools via port (no network)
FakeMcpRegistryClient seeds demo-server with echo/stats tools
DI registers IMcpRegistryClient to FakeMcpRegistryClient
MCP boundary documented
McpToolKeys.Format produces stable mcp.{server}.{tool} keys
ToolRegistry.CreateDefault binds IMcpRegistryClient tools with McpToolExecutor
MCP tool execution routes through IToolExecutor to fake registry

docker-compose exposes agentor-api on 8080
GitHub Actions CI restores/builds/tests Agentor.sln
scripts/smoke.ps1 hits GET /health

HttpKnowledgeStateClient exercises Athanor-shaped GET paths

HttpExternalAgentProtocolClient lists capabilities and posts invocations
GET /health is liveness-only (returns alive)
GET /ready and GET /api/v1/integrations/status expose modes without secrets
HTTP integration probes treat unreachable host or non-2xx response as not ready

PR51: Optional TenantId/WorkspaceId/ProjectId/KnowledgeScopeId on AgentRun and StartAgentRun round-trip through persistence.
PR51: ResolveAthanorProjectId() prefers explicit ProjectId over ProfileId.
PR51: When ProjectId is unset, Athanor project id falls back to ProfileId (backward compatible).
PR52: ActiveProfile.DeniedToolKeys overrides flat RuntimePolicyOptions.DeniedToolKeys when profile is set.
PR52: ActiveProfile MCP denied tool keys deny MCP tool calls with MCP_TOOL_DENIED.
PR52: ActiveProfile external-agent denied tool keys deny external-agent tools.
PR52: Versioned PolicyBundle / full enterprise policy engine (deferred beyond PolicyProfileRules).
acceptanceItems.evidence: Not implemented; PolicyProfileRules is a first runtime profile step only.

acceptanceItems.description: PR53: Approve human review resumes RequiresReview tool and run to Running.
PR53: Reject human review fails the reviewed run and tool.
PR53: RequestChanges records a decision without resuming tool execution (run stays RequiresReview).
PR53: After Approve, post-approval policy Deny still fails the run (approval does not override Deny).
PR53: Multi-step plan executor resume semantics beyond the single pending-tool path (deferred).
acceptanceItems.evidence: Requires dedicated plan-executor tests and docs; not in this harness pass.

acceptanceItems.description: PR54: X-Agentor-Actor-Id header selects the acting principal when it is a non-empty GUID.
PR54: When the header is absent, a fixed local-dev fallback actor id is used (not an identity provider).
PR55: Audit export canonical JSON is stable; SHA-256 matches UTF-8 bytes of canonical JSON.
PR55: Audit export redacts property names matching apiKey/secret/password/token substrings (baseline key-name redaction).
PR55: Human review decisions persist through EF Core save/load (JSON column).
PR55.5: StartAgentRunRequestDto governance scope fields round-trip via public GET /agent-runs/{id}.
POST /api/v1/agent-runs/queued enqueues work; GET polls status (in-memory background or inline per options).
OutboxDispatcher marks succeeded on happy path; retries then poison when sink throws (MaxDispatchAttempts).
EfExecutionLeaseStore: acquire, contest, release, reclaim after expiry; EfDistributedOperationLedger duplicate key returns false.
TransportResilienceRegistry opens circuit after threshold failures; snapshot reports circuit open.
EF round-trip for outbox_messages, execution_leases, distributed_operations (Sqlite EnsureCreated).
ResilientIntegrationDelegatingHandler buffers request body once and sends a cloned HttpRequestMessage per attempt (no resend of consumed HttpContent).
HTTP resilience retries stop at MaxRetries+1 attempts for retryable status codes.
Non-retryable HTTP status is not retried.
Open transport circuit returns synthetic 503 without invoking inner handler.
Management APIs under /api/v1 for recipes, plans from recipe, skill packages, policy profiles; structured validation errors (ApiErrorDto); create never executes plans.
Run product inspection: GET /runs/{id}/timeline, coordination-view, audit-packet mirrors audit export SHA-256 header.
Read-only operator dashboard DTO with module hrefs and counts from query handlers.
GET /reviews/pending returns paged RequiresReview inbox; POST /reviews/{runId}/decisions aliases human-review (409 when run not in review).
Phase 13 documentation set (API, operator, developer, examples) states Athanor/Conexus boundaries and non-canonization.
Versioned evaluation fixture registry with JSON discovery/load (schema 4).
RunEvaluationHarness-style fixture definitions parse from JSON (schema >=2).
Same evaluation harness materializes runs/plans under multiple CoordinationEvaluationProfile values.
Profile evaluation records coordination-oriented counters from traces/manifests (tool/policy/trace signals).
JSON quality rule sets evaluate with built-in predicates only (no scripting).
Invalid rule configuration is rejected or fails evaluation deterministically.
CoordinationEvaluationMetrics derives summaries from AgentRun + optional RunManifest without external secrets.
EvaluationReportGenerator emits deterministic Markdown/JSON/CSV and can write a CI artifact folder.
Harness reconciliation: phase 14 / PR70.5, verification log, session handoff, verify-harness.ps1.
Redaction surface: SensitiveFieldCatalog, RedactionPolicy, RedactionResult, JsonRedaction; audit export + evaluation report JSON redacted; unit tests; developer doc.
BenchmarkDotNet project compiles in solution; performance baseline doc with targets and regression policy.
CI: restore/build/test, EF migrations list, evaluation regression slice, Docker image build, TRX test artifacts.
DTO JSON round-trip compatibility tests; contract versioning and migration/rollback docs.
v1.0 RC notes, architecture boundary review, roadmap pointer.
